title: begonia tenera var. thwaitesii
intro: Begonia tenera var. thwaitesii, also known as the Sri Lankan Begonia, is a perennial plant native to Sri Lanka, characterized by its unique leaves and stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its roots and leaves. The Sri Lankan Begonia is known for its various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions.
